positive: A minimalist, geometric illustration depicting a celestial animal (e.g., a stylized constellation fox or lunar griffin) taking flight amongst abstract, glowing nebulae and geometric constellations. The composition should feature a clean, symmetrical silhouette of the main subject, outlined in glowing gold lines against a deep indigo and midnight blue gradient background. Use negative space effectively. The style should be a blend of Art Deco and modern abstract poster design, highly detailed, hyper-clean vector look, high contrast, limited vibrant jewel-toned color palette (sapphire, amethyst, emerald, gold). Perfect for screen printing on apparel. Central, emblem-style composition.
negative: photorealistic, low resolution, watermark, text, signature, blur, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, grainy, dirty, jpeg artifacts
